tasks.label: Build all
args: for d in ${workspaceFolder}/problems/*/; do if [ -f "$d/Makefile" ]; then echo Building $d; (cd "$d" && make); fi; done

tasks.label: Clean all
args: for d in ${workspaceFolder}/problems/*/; do if [ -f "$d/Makefile" ]; then echo Cleaning $d; (cd "$d" && make clean); fi; done
